actionUnits.condition: EventTrigger (fileID: 137028029, script guid: d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) has a PointerClick (eventID: 4) configured with a persistent call to Bank.showlabel() on MonoBehaviour fileID: 137028027 (script guid: b78288e601dcaac41ae0297908e55692). Trigger this to update the Player's label to the first 20 chars of 'Bank:Lucario's Bank Co.'.

EventTrigger (fileID: 137028029; script guid: d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) on Building101 configures PointerClick (eventID: 4) to call Bank.showlabel() on MonoBehaviour fileID: 137028027 (script guid: b78288e601dcaac41ae0297908e55692). Trigger to update Player's label text to the first 20 chars of 'Bank:Lucario's Bank Co.'.
